# OpenClaw Is Dead — Full Dataset

> Complete dataset of every public declaration that OpenClaw is dead. Updated daily.
> Site: https://www.openclawdeaths.xyz
> Creator: Lorenzo Trichard

## Summary

- Total obituaries: 121
- Date range: 2026-02-02 to 2026-03-29
- Source: Twitter/X exclusively
- Current GitHub stars: 335,000+
- Methodology: Posts scored 1-5 on severity, only score 3+ published

## All Obituaries
